title: Piano Concertos By Candlelight The Best Of Mozart Feat Candlelight Orchestra
description: SELLOUT EdFringe25 pianist Matthew Shiel performs Mozart’s BEST piano concertos with his Candlelight Orchestra. Matthew Shiel has personally chosen favourite movements (with entertaining commentary!): Concerto No. 20 in D minor, K. 466 – I. Allegro (from Oscar-winning film "Amadeus") No. 21 in C major, K. 467 – II. Andante (“Elvira Madigan”) No. 9 in E flat major, K. 271 – I. Allegro (“Jeunehomme”) No. 23 in A major, K. 488 – II. Adagio No. 27 in B♭ major, K. 595 – III. Allegro. Matthew Shiel is an award-winning pianist who has collaborated with BBC Scottish Symphony Orchestra (broadcast on BBC Radio 3), The Band of His Majesty’s Royal Marine Band Scotland and has been broadcast on Al Jazeera. Matthew will conduct his acclaimed Candlelight Orchestra from the piano as Mozart himself did for an unforgettable evening of musical elegance.

venue.name: St Paul's Church
venue.address: St Pauls Church, West Street, East Sussex
